description:
Your own trading app — installable, offline, zero backend. 💻

Build a paper trading simulator in React that uses real market data, tracks your cost basis, and runs AI analysis on demand — all in the browser with no backend required. This walkthrough covers every feature of Trading Hub Simulator: live price feeds, buy/sell logic with weighted average cost basis, gamified missions, a floating AI chatbot, and an OpenRouter-powered deep market analysis panel.

The entire state lives in localStorage — no login, no server, no setup beyond opening the page.


🎯 What you'll learn
- Fetching real-time stock prices and falling back to offline simulation on API failure
- Atomic portfolio state updates with weighted average cost basis calculation
- Integrating OpenRouter's multi-model fallback for AI chat and market analysis
- Gamified mission logic tied to real trading actions (First Trade, Diamond Hands, etc.)
- Route-level code splitting with React lazy + Suspense for fast initial load
- Persisting all app state in localStorage with clean hook abstractions

Trading Hub is a complete paper trading simulator built with React and TypeScript that demonstrates how to wire real-time market data, complex state management, and AI market analysis into a single-page app. Whether you're learning React TypeScript patterns or exploring OpenRouter AI integration, this project covers the full stack of a production-quality stock market simulator with gamified missions that keep practice engaging.
